query:
-- Step-by-step breakdown from pipelineStepLogs if available
SELECT 
  stepName,
  status,
  startedAt,
  completedAt,
  ROUND((UNIX_TIMESTAMP(completedAt) - UNIX_TIMESTAMP(startedAt)), 0) AS durationSeconds,
  outputSummary
FROM pipelineStepLogs
WHERE pipelineRunId = 1590001
ORDER BY startedAt ASC;
